name: labs-agent-workflow
description: A structured agent workflow system for managing work in Claude Code, backed by either GitHub Issues + a GitHub Project board or Jira Cloud via the Atlassian MCP. Provides 12 skills covering the full ticket lifecycle: project-start, create-ticket (bug / work-order / context + promote), create-backlog (bulk triage), research, plan, build (code/doc/script/api/figma), and verify.
